name: tl;dv
description: Meeting recorder/transcriber with timestamps and highlights

developer.comment: German company headquartered in Aachen, Germany; founded by Raphael Allstadt, Carlo Thissen and Allan Bettarel.

first-release.comment: tl;dv was founded in April 2020; using the founding date as the first-release proxy as no precise public-launch month is documented. Checked 2026-06-12.

status.comment: Actively sold and developed product as of June 2026.

license.comment: Closed-source SaaS with a free tier plus paid plans.

primary-type.comment: Records and transcribes Zoom/Meet/Teams meetings and produces AI notes/summaries.

real-time-dictation.comment: Meeting transcriber, not a speak-to-type dictation tool; transcripts are produced from recorded meetings.

file-transcription.comment: Recording uploads (upload existing audio/video to transcribe) are available on paid plans.

live-meeting-capture.comment: Records live Zoom, Google Meet and Microsoft Teams calls; markets itself as 'no bot required' (native recording rather than a visible bot avatar).

streaming-low-latency.comment: Transcripts are generated after the meeting concludes rather than as a live running caption stream.

audio-sources.comment: Captures live meeting/conference audio (system-audio incl. participant mics) and accepts recording uploads on paid plans; marketed as no-bot.

underlying-engine.comment: tl;dv does not publicly disclose its speech-recognition engine. (It partners with Anthropic for AI summaries, but that is the summarization LLM, not the transcription ASR.)

language-count.comment: Vendor states '30+ languages' for transcription; recorded as approx 30.

english-accuracy.comment: No independent WER benchmark or credible review of English accuracy found; vendor claims 'leading industry accuracy' but that is marketing. Per guidelines, left null rather than guessing.

multilingual-auto-detect.comment: Transcribes meetings across 30+ languages; detects and handles non-English audio.

custom-vocabulary.comment: No documented user-facing custom-dictionary/vocabulary-boost feature found in official materials; could not confirm either way.

speaker-diarization.comment: Identifies different speakers and reflects them in the transcript.

timestamps.comment: Provides timestamps and timestamped highlights for navigating recordings.

ai-summaries-notes.comment: Automated AI meeting notes, summaries and action items (free tier limited to 10 AI summaries lifetime).

built-in-editor.comment: In-app editing of recordings/transcripts incl. creating and combining clips/highlights; not a media-by-text editor à la Descript.

translation.comment: AI can translate transcripts and meeting summaries into other languages.

export-formats.comment: Recordings, transcripts and clips can be downloaded, but the specific transcript file formats (txt/docx/srt/etc.) are not documented in official materials; left null rather than guessing the format set.

processing-location.comment: Cloud-only SaaS; data centers in Europe (GCP, AWS, Hetzner) with a choice of EU or US AI hosting.

offline-capable.comment: Cloud-based service; requires a network connection.

data-used-for-training.comment: Vendor explicitly states 'No customer data is used to train the AI'; metadata anonymized and meeting segments randomized before any AI processing.

data-deletion-control.comment: Users can delete recordings; free-tier recordings auto-delete after 3 months while paid plans offer permanent retention, indicating retention control.

platforms.comment: Primarily web-based; listed as Web, iPhone/iPad and Android apps. Records desktop meetings via the web app; no standalone native desktop app noted.

system-wide-dictation.comment: Not a dictation tool; no OS-wide speak-to-type.

integrations.comment: Integrates with Zoom, Google Meet and Teams; plus Slack, Notion, Google Calendar, and CRMs (Salesforce/HubSpot native on Business, Zapier on Pro), and 5,000+ apps.

api-automation.comment: Automation via Zapier and 5,000+ app integrations; power-user automation hooks available.

pricing-model.comment: Free tier plus per-user subscription plans (Pro, Business, Enterprise).

free-tier.comment: Genuinely usable free plan, not just a trial.

free-allowance.value: Unlimited recordings & transcripts in 30+ languages; 10 AI summaries lifetime; recordings auto-delete after 3 months; basic integrations only
free-allowance.comment: Free-tier limits as of June 2026; some sources also cite a ~40 recordings/week cap.

entry-price-usd-mo.comment: Pro plan $18/user/mo billed annually (with 40% promo); $29/user/mo on monthly billing. Checked 2026-06-12.
